edges.rationale: Once diagnosis is understood, caregivers need to know disease-modifying therapies exist and what eligibility involves.
This module addresses the diagnosis moment; first-two-weeks module addresses immediate emotional and practical next steps.
After understanding the diagnosis, caregivers need guidance on ongoing specialist relationships.
If Lewy body dementia is diagnosed or suspected, this module's antipsychotic sensitivity warning is critical.
The diagnosis moment triggers early grief; this module provides emotional scaffolding.
